creator: wenheping2000@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Florian Limberger from comment #1)

Hi,

   I have the same wondering, but in mypy upstream code, setup.py have the line:

install_requires = ['typed-ast >= 1.1.0, < 1.2.0',
                    'mypy_extensions >= 0.4.0, < 0.5.0',
                   ],

  Without mypy_extensions, mypy can not run.

wen
